Name: Feint
Effect: Single Target. Reaction 6. Late Reaction 1. This Move may be used as a Reaction or as a Late Reaction at convenience of the User. This Move ignores the effects of any Shield Move active on the Target and removes their effects for the rest of the Round.
Description: The user begins their attack, and as their target attempts to protect itself, the user feints the target to break their defense against their true strike.
